ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2023 Continued To Mar-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl, via Zoom, for Daniel Genera, Personal Representative.

The court advises counsel that it believed that she would be filing a petition for final distribution. Counsel advises that delays have prevented her from filing a petition and that she believed that she would be able to obtain waivers of accounting but has not been able to do so. Counsel requests an additional continuance to file a petition.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Mar-14-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Avila. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Continued To Feb-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Lofdahl, via Zoom, for Daniel Genera, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports of a pending listing to sell real property of which the Estate is entitled to 1/2. interest and of the intent to file a petition for final distribution as soon as the sale is finalized. Counsel requests a continuance accordingly.

The matter is continued to Feb-14-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nazaruz. Not Reported.
